scripts.check:all: pnpm type-check && pnpm lint && pnpm format:check
scripts.fix:all: pnpm -r run fix && pnpm exec prettier --write . --list-different
scripts.check:ci: pnpm type-check && pnpm lint && pnpm format:check && pnpm --filter './templates/*' test && pnpm --filter './templates/*' build
scripts.perf:check: pnpm --filter ./templates/nextjs-app perf:check && pnpm --filter ./templates/astro-site perf:check && pnpm --filter ./templates/vite-react-app perf:check
